productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max White Sports Shoes
description: Styled with an aesthetic appeal and engineered with comfort, the nike Air Max+ 2012 has a lacing system that is integrated with nike’s revolutionary Flywire technology. With its high strength thread work, like that of cables used in suspension bridges, constructed exactly at those places where the foot needs that extra support. The shock absorption technology in the Nike Air Max+ 2012 has a low profile phylon midsole that is employed with a 180° Max Air unit to provide optimal cushioning and impact protection. Upper Mesh upper with supportive overlays for breathability and lockdown Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue Textile lining with a cushioned footbed for added comfort Ultra-lightweight Flywire bundles are integrated with the lacing system for extra support Internal seamless forefoot inner sleeve Internal underlay support frame Midsole Internal underlay support frame Low-profile Phylon midsole with 180° visible Max Air sole unit for optimal cushioning and impact absorption Outsole Forefoot flex grooves for ultimate multi-directional flexibility Strategically placed rubber pods in the outsole for traction and durability Rubber outsole with enhanced traction patterns for better surface grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
